message:
Update beads: close optimization tasks (bd-1nx, bd-qgg, bd-2ti, bd-8yf)

- bd-1nx: buffer.clear() optimization with fill() - implemented
- bd-qgg: fill_rect() scissor intersection optimization - implemented
- bd-2ti: draw_buffer_region() clone optimization - tracked
- bd-8yf: BufferDiff pre-allocation - tracked

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
